chapter_title.en: Chapter 113 – The one in Ihraam catches the prey repeatedly

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/388)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/388)
text: الْمُحْرِمِ يَصِيدُ الطَّيْرَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ الْكَفَّارَةُ فِي كُلِّ مَا أَصَابَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Muawiya Bin Ammar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the one in Ihram hunting the birds. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Upon him is the expiation regarding everything what he attains’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “This is about a man who in the state of Ihram hunts a bird. He (the Imam) said, ‘He owes expiation for whatever he kills.’”
